text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇶 ⚡ The US Department of Justice is offering a reward of 10 million dollars for any information regarding the leader of one of the Iraqi resistance groups called Sayed Al-Shuhada Brigades, Haj Abu Alaa Al-Waleed. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇶 ⚡ 美国司法部悬赏1000万美元，征集有关伊拉克抵抗组织之一“赛义德烈士旅”（Sayed Al-Shuhada Brigades）领导人哈吉·阿布·阿拉·瓦利德（Haj Abu Alaa Al-Waleed）的信息。 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇮🇶 🇮🇷 The U.S. State Department is offering a reward of up to $10 million for information on Hashim Finyan Rahim al‑Saraji (also known as Abu Ala al‑Wala’i), the leader and secretary general of Kata’ib Sayyid al‑Shuhada (KSS), an Iran‑aligned milita group in Iraq. KSS members have allegedly "killed Iraqi civilians and attacked U.S. diplomatic facilities, military bases and personnel." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇮🇶 🇮🇷 美国国务院悬赏最高1000万美元，征集有关哈希姆·芬扬·拉希姆·萨拉吉（Hashim Finyan Rahim al‑Saraji，又名阿布·阿拉·瓦莱，Abu Ala al‑Wala’i）的信息，他是伊拉克境内亲伊朗民兵组织“赛义德烈士旅”（KSS）的领导人兼秘书长。据称，KSS成员曾“杀害伊拉克平民，并袭击了美国外交设施、军事基地和人员”。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇴🇲 🇷🇺 Iran's Foreign Minister Seyyed Abbas Araghchi will begin a regional tour visiting Islamabad, Muscat, and Moscow for bilateral consultations, discussions on current regional developments. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇴🇲 🇷🇺 伊朗外交部长赛义德·阿巴斯·阿拉格齐（Seyyed Abbas Araghchi）将开启地区访问行程，前往伊斯兰堡、马斯喀特和莫斯科进行双边磋商，并讨论当前的地区局势发展。 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇴🇲 🇷🇺 Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi will begin a tour to Islamabad, Muscat and Moscow starting Friday evening for bilateral consultations, discussions on regional developments and the latest situation of the US‑Israeli imposed war against Iran. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 🇴🇲 🇷🇺 伊朗外交部长阿巴斯·阿拉格齐将于周五晚开始对伊斯兰堡、马斯喀特和莫斯科进行访问，进行双边磋商，讨论地区局势发展以及美以强加给伊朗的战争的最新情况。 @wfwitness

text: Germany’s Bundestag President Julia Klöckner was reportedly targeted in a phishing-style hack involving the messaging app Signal. Hackers posed as Signal support to trick users into revealing PIN codes, part of a wider campaign targeting European politicians. Klöckner was in a group chat with members of the Christian Democratic Union, including Chancellor Friedrich Merz, though there’s no evidence his device was compromised. Source: Der Spiegel
text_zh: 据报道，德国联邦议院副议长朱莉娅·克洛克纳（Julia Klöckner）成为了一起针对即时通讯软件Signal的网络钓鱼式黑客攻击的目标。黑客冒充Signal官方支持人员，诱骗用户泄露PIN码，这是针对欧洲政界人士的更广泛行动的一部分。克洛克纳当时正在一个包含基督教民主联盟成员的群聊中，其中包括总理候选人弗里德里希·默茨（Friedrich Merz），但目前没有证据表明他的设备受到了损害。来源：《明镜周刊》

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth stated: "Unlike the endless wars of the past that dragged on for years and for decades with little to show for it, Operation Epic Fury has delivered a decisive military result in just weeks." @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. Defence Secretary Pete Hegseth said the naval blockade on Iran has turned back every targeted ship and is going global, adding that iran has a chance to make a good deal: “That mission continues today, in this new phase, as Iran has an important choice, a chance to make a deal, a good deal, a wise deal. As part of that effort, the United States has imposed an ironclad blockade that grows more powerful by the day. From the Gulf of Oman to the open oceans, our Navy is enforcing this blockade without hesitation or apology. Now, as usual, there's a lot of false information out there. Every ship that the U.S. believes meets our criteria, either Iranian ships or to and from Iranian ports, has been turned around. As of this morning, 34 total. Non-Iranian vessels are allowed to transit, and many have, including overnight. Not only is the blockade growing, in fact, a second aircraft carrier will join the blockade in just a few days, but this growing blockade is also gone global. Just this week, we seized two Iranian dark fleet ships in the Indo-Pacific region that had left Iranian ports before the blockade went into effect. They thought they’d made it out just in time. They did not. We seized their sanctioned ships, and we will seize more.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国国防部长皮特·赫格塞斯（Pete Hegseth）表示：‘与过去那些拖延数年甚至数十年却收效甚微的无休止战争不同，“史诗之怒”行动（Operation Epic Fury）在短短几周内就取得了决定性的军事成果。’ @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国国防部长皮特·赫格塞斯表示，对伊朗的海上封锁已经拦截了每一艘目标船只，并且正在全球范围内展开。他补充说，伊朗有机会达成一项好的协议：“这项任务今天仍在继续，在这个新阶段，伊朗面临一个重要的选择，一个达成协议、达成好协议、达成明智协议的机会。作为该努力的一部分，美国实施了日益强大的铁壁封锁。从阿曼湾到公海，我们的海军正在毫不犹豫、无需道歉地执行这项封锁。现在，像往常一样，外面有很多虚假信息。美国认为符合我们标准的每一艘船只，无论是伊朗船只还是往返于伊朗港口的船只，都被调头了。截至今天早上，总共34艘。非伊朗船只被允许通行，许多已经通行，包括昨晚。封锁不仅在加强，事实上，第二艘航空母舰将在几天内加入封锁，而且这种日益扩大的封锁已经走向全球。就在本周，我们在印太地区扣押了两艘伊朗‘影子船队’船只，它们在封锁生效前离开了伊朗港口。他们以为自己及时逃脱了。但并没有。我们扣押了他们受制裁的船只，我们还会扣押更多。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇸🇦 🇮🇱 Sources to Al Jadeed: Visitors to Yarzeh quoted Prince Yazid bin Farhan emphasizing that the position of the Premiership in Lebanon is a red line. Prince Yazid bin Farhan confirmed Saudi Arabia's support for the implementation of the Taif Agreement, the full withdrawal of Israel from Lebanese territories, and the restriction of weapons to the state, provided that this war is the last. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇸🇦 🇮🇱 消息人士向黎巴嫩灯塔电视台 (Al Jadeed) 透露：访问亚尔泽 (Yarzeh) 的人士援引亚齐德·本·法尔汉亲王的话强调，黎巴嫩总理职位是红线。亚齐德·本·法尔汉亲王确认沙特阿拉伯支持落实《塔伊夫协议》、以色列全面撤出黎巴嫩领土以及武器收归国家所有，前提是这场战争是最后一场。@wfwitness

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) Reports about a Ukrainian drone attack on Russian targets in the city of Kaspiysk located in Republic of Dagestan, southern Russia. Kaspiysk is situated on the Caspian Sea's coast, over 800km from the border with Ukraine. The city hosts an important base of the Russian Navy's Caspian Flotilla. In the footage circulating on social media, Ukrainian Lyutyi long-range OWA-UAVs can be seen being engaged by Russian air defenses over Kaspiysk on Friday's afternoon. tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）关于乌克兰无人机袭击俄罗斯达吉斯坦共和国首府卡斯皮斯克市目标的报道。卡斯皮斯克位于里海沿岸，距离乌克兰边境超过800公里。该市驻扎着俄罗斯海军里海区舰队的重要基地。在社交媒体流传的视频中，周五下午，乌克兰的“柳特” (Lyutyi) 远程单向攻击无人机在卡斯皮斯克上空遭到俄罗斯防空系统的拦截。推文

text: WarMonitor During WWII, a certain dictator repeatedly sidelined or removed military leaders who questioned his risky orders or raised legal and ethical objections, prioritizing loyalty over expertise to tighten control, a move that ultimately led to worse decisions as the war dragged on. Hegseth has now fired 34 military leaders WTF is going on? - Nostra, House of Gold tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 在二战期间，某位独裁者多次排挤或撤换那些质疑其冒险命令或提出法律和道德异议的军事领导人，将忠诚置于专业之上以加强控制，这一举动最终导致随着战争拖延，决策变得更加糟糕。赫格塞斯现在解雇了34名军事领导人，到底发生了什么？ - Nostra, House of Gold 推文

text: Open Source Intel Secretary of War Pete Hegseth: It's also worth saying this should not be America's fight alone. We barely use the Strait of Hormuz as a country. Our energy doesn't flow through there, and we have plenty of energy. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047652518126051538/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 战争部长皮特·赫格塞斯：同样值得一提的是，这不应该仅仅是美国的战斗。作为一个国家，我们几乎不使用霍尔木兹海峡。我们的能源不流经那里，而且我们拥有充足的能源。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2047652518126051538/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Secretary of War Pete Hegseth: The vessels that the Iranians seized in recent days, a couple of them, they're not American or Israeli ships. They're just random ships. They drove their little speedboats up to and shot at those ships with AK-47s. Anyone with a speedboat, a gun, and the wrong intentions can do that. They know that we, the United States of America, control the flow of global shipping. And we know that they know. Their real navy is at the bottom of the Arabian Gulf. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 战争部长皮特·赫格塞斯：伊朗人最近几天扣押的船只，其中几艘，它们不是美国或以色列的船只。它们只是随机的船只。他们驾驶着小快艇靠近，并用AK-47向这些船只射击。任何拥有快艇、枪支和不良企图的人都能做到这一点。他们知道我们，美利坚合众国，控制着全球航运的流动。我们也知道他们知道这一点。他们真正的海军在阿拉伯湾的底部。推文

text: OSINTtechnical Hegseth calls US allies in Europe and Asia “freeriders.” “America and the free world deserves allies who are capable and loyal… Europe needs the Strait of Hormuz much more than we do.” https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2047651454194790858/video/1 tweet

text: WarMonitor Those "pirates" still have missiles, drones and the means to keep the Strait closed. Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth claims Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps "has been reduced to a gang of pirates with a flag." - Aaron Blake tweet

text: Open Source Intel Secretary of War Pete Hegseth: Iran's battered military, the IRGC specifically, has been reduced to a gang of pirates with a flag. They cloak their aggression in slogans, but the world now sees them for what they are, criminals on the high seas. They don't control anything. They're acting like pirates, acting like terrorists. They are the bad actors tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 战争部长皮特·赫格塞斯：伊朗受损的军队，特别是伊斯兰革命卫队，已经被削减为一群挂着旗帜的海盗。他们用口号掩盖自己的侵略行为，但世界现在看清了他们的真面目，他们是公海上的罪犯。他们什么都控制不了。他们的行为就像海盗，就像恐怖分子。他们是坏人 推文

text: 📝 А куда все делось? 📝 ракеты у США быстро иссякли Американские расходы на операцию против Ирана вызвали много дискуссий в американских СМИ. Считали всем светом о том, сколько миллиардов ушло за войну и сколько уйдет на восстановление. И одной из статей расходов станет арсенал высокоточных крылатых ракет дальнего действия JASSM, которых намерены приобрести почти 4300 единиц у Lockheed Martin в течение следующих пяти лет. 🔻 Какова ситуация с этими ракетами? ➡ В предстоящем финансовом году планируется произвести 821 ракету, при этом ежегодные закупки будут увеличиваться примерно до 900 к 2028 году и стабилизируются на уровне 860 в год после этого. ➡ Цель состоит в том, чтобы увеличить общий запас до 11 тысяч ракет к 2031 году в рамках усилий по восстановлению запасов, истощенных в ходе недавних операций. ➡ При этом на 2026-й год американцы вообще заказали 360-380 ракет, явно не планировав большие расходы этого вида вооружения. 🖍 Подсчёты Bloomberg едва ли можно назвать точными. Они говорят об общем запасе в 11 тысяч, не принимая во внимание, что часть ракет уже давно израсходована, а другая — небоеготова. 🚩 Только за первые четыре недели последней войны в Конгрессе США упоминали о расходе свыше 1 тысячи ракет последней модификации JASSM-ER, а их всего было произведено около 2,3 тысяч. 🏳 В учет не пошли ракеты, которые потратили летом или у которых истек срок хранения. В учёт не взяли то, что часть произведенных JASSM уходила и уйдет на экспорт странам-партнерам, таким как Австралия или Польша. ❗ Поэтому планы США на восстановление грандиозные, но займет это много лет и придется потратить сотни миллиардов долларов. И вот такие подсчёты СМИ будут сопровождать этот процесс ещё очень долго. Инфографика в высоком разрешении English version #Иран #США ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉ VK | ✉ RuTube | ✉ ОК | ✉ Дзен 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: 📝 东西都去哪了？📝 美国的导弹很快就耗尽了。美国在针对伊朗的行动上的支出引发了美国媒体的广泛讨论。全世界都在计算战争花费了多少十亿，以及重建需要多少钱。其中一项支出是远程高精度巡航导弹JASSM的库存，美国打算在未来五年内从洛克希德·马丁公司购买近4300枚。🔻 这些导弹的情况如何？➡ 在即将到来的财政年度，计划生产821枚导弹，年度采购量到2028年将增加到约900枚，此后稳定在每年860枚。➡ 目标是在2031年前将总库存增加到1.1万枚，作为补充近期行动中消耗的库存的努力的一部分。➡ 同时，美国人甚至为2026年订购了360-380枚导弹，显然没有计划这种武器的大规模消耗。🖍 彭博社的计算很难说是准确的。他们谈论的是1.1万枚的总库存，却没有考虑到部分导弹早已消耗，而另一部分则处于不可用状态。🚩 仅在最近一场战争的前四周，美国国会就提到消耗了超过1000枚最新改进型的JASSM-ER导弹，而这种导弹总共才生产了约2300枚。🏳 那些在夏天消耗掉或保质期已过的导弹没有被计入。也没有考虑到部分生产的JASSM已经并将继续出口给澳大利亚或波兰等伙伴国家。❗ 因此，美国的重建计划是宏大的，但这将需要很多年，并且必须花费数千亿美元。媒体的这些计算将伴随这一过程很长一段时间。高分辨率信息图 英文版 #伊朗 #美国 ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉ VK | ✉ RuTube | ✉ ОК | ✉ Dzen 💸 支持我们

text: Hegseth: The one institution that should win the Nobel Peace Prize every single year is the United States military.
text_zh: 赫格塞斯：唯一一个每年都应该获得诺贝尔和平奖的机构是美国军队。

text: 🔄 Forwarded from Fotros Resistance: 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 | Footage shows Israel's Ben Gurion Airport filled with American KC-46 and KC-135 refueling aircrafts. @FotrosResistancee
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 Fotros Resistance：🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 | 视频显示以色列本古里安机场停满了美国的KC-46和KC-135加油机。@FotrosResistancee

text: Reporter: You talk a lot about bombing people and places... What’s going through your mind and body when you give these violent orders? Hegseth: My only thought process is to ensure that our warfighters have everything they need... war is violent.
text_zh: 记者：你经常谈论轰炸人和地方……当你下达这些暴力命令时，你的思想和身体在想什么？赫格塞斯：我唯一的思考过程是确保我们的作战人员拥有他们需要的一切……战争是暴力的。

text: ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah has released a statement: “In response to the Israeli ceasefire violation and attacks on civilians in Tulin, we targeted a gathering of Israeli soldiers in Al-Qantara at 13:00, carrying out a surprise attack and achieving a direct hit.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党发表声明：“作为对以色列违反停火协议并袭击图林 (Tulin) 平民的回应，我们在13:00瞄准了阿尔-坎塔拉 (Al-Qantara) 的以色列士兵聚集点，进行了突袭并实现了直接命中。” @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇦🇫 U.S. Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth announced a Defense Department review of the "Disastrous" Afghanistan withdrawal: "What we've undertaken at this department is a historic Afghanistan review. So we have, over the course of months, reviewed what…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇾🇪 U.S. Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth stated that Hamas conducted october seven and Houthi shipping due to U.S. weakness under Former U.S. President Joe Biden: "Hamas made choices and saw that America wouldn't do anything about it. Houthis shot at ships. They made choices because Joe Biden and his administration were seen as feckless and weak. And that with part of what the world saw, people hanging to planes as we as we fled." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇦🇫 美国国防部长皮特·赫格塞斯宣布国防部对‘灾难性’的阿富汗撤军进行审查：‘我们在该部门所做的是一次历史性的阿富汗审查。所以，在过去的几个月里，我们审查了……’” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 🇾🇪 美国国防部长皮特·赫格塞斯表示，哈马斯发动10月7日袭击以及胡塞武装袭击航运是由于美国前总统乔·拜登领导下的美国软弱所致：‘哈马斯做出了选择，并看到美国对此不会采取任何行动。胡塞武装射击船只。他们做出选择是因为乔·拜登及其政府被视为软弱无能。这就是世界所看到的一部分，当我们逃离时，人们挂在飞机上。’ @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇪🇺🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth on EU plane to send help to free the Strait of Hormuz: Reporter: "Have any European countries reached out to assist in cordoning off the strait and participating in escorts?" Pete: "I know there's a lot…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇦🇫 U.S. Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth announced a Defense Department review of the "Disastrous" Afghanistan withdrawal: "What we've undertaken at this department is a historic Afghanistan review. So we have, over the course of months, reviewed what happened leading up to and including the events at Abbey Gate and the disastrous withdrawal in Afghanistan. There's never actually been a full accounting in this department of the decisions that were made. That has happened. That review will come. Later this summer, and I think you'll find it to be probably the most comprehensive review this department has ever done." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇪🇺🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国国防部长皮特·赫格塞斯在前往欧盟的飞机上谈及派遣援助以解放霍尔木兹海峡：记者：‘是否有任何欧洲国家联系以协助封锁海峡并参与护航？’ 皮特：‘我知道有很多……’” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇦🇫 美国国防部长皮特·赫格塞斯宣布国防部对‘灾难性’的阿富汗撤军进行审查：‘我们在该部门所做的是一次历史性的阿富汗审查。所以，在过去的几个月里，我们审查了导致阿比门 (Abbey Gate) 事件及阿富汗灾难性撤军的经过。该部门从未对所做的决定进行过全面的核算。现在已经发生了。审查结果将会公布。今年夏天晚些时候，我认为你会发现这可能是该部门有史以来最全面的审查。’ @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness" False identification
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区无人机警报响起。@wfwitness” 虚假识别

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 Hezbollah Member of Parliament Mohammed Raad: Any supposed truce that grants the occupying enemy in Lebanon a special exception to fire or carry out any field action in confrontation zones and within Lebanese territory, whether it's to fortify a…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah Member of Parliament Mohamad Raad: The authorities should be ashamed of their people and withdraw from what has been termed direct negotiations. Any meeting between a Lebanese party and an Israeli one during the current state of war will not achieve any Lebanese national consensus at all and will constitute a clear constitutional violation. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇱🇧🇮🇱 真主党议员穆罕默德·拉德：任何所谓的停火协议，如果给予黎巴嫩境内的占领敌军在对抗区和黎巴嫩领土内开火或采取任何实地行动的特殊豁免权，无论是为了加固……” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党议员穆罕默德·拉德：当局应该为他们的人民感到羞耻，并退出所谓的直接谈判。在当前战争状态下，黎巴嫩任何一方与以色列一方之间的任何会晤都根本无法达成任何黎巴嫩全国共识，并将构成明显的宪法违规。@wfwitness

text: Hegseth: There was a silly conference in Europe last week where they talked about maybe doing something when things are done. Those are not serious efforts yet... we would like Europe to contribute.
text_zh: 赫格塞斯：上周在欧洲举行了一场愚蠢的会议，他们谈论的是在事情结束后可能做些什么。这些还不是严肃的努力……我们希望欧洲能做出贡献。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth on Hormuz traffic: "So transit is occurring much more limited than anybody would like to see and with more risk than people would like to see, but that's because Iran is doing irresponsible things with small fastboats…" ⚡️ 🇪🇺 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth on EU plane to send help to free the Strait of Hormuz: Reporter: "Have any European countries reached out to assist in cordoning off the strait and participating in escorts?" Pete: "I know there's a lot of talks, You saw the I would call it a silly conference. In in Europe last week where they got together and talked about talking about maybe doing something eventually when things are done. Those are not serious efforts yet. We would welcome that." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国国防部长皮特·赫格塞斯谈霍尔木兹海峡交通：‘所以交通的发生比任何人希望看到的都要有限得多，而且风险也比人们希望看到的要大，但这是因为伊朗用小型快艇在做不负责任的事情……’” ⚡️ 🇪🇺 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国国防部长皮特·赫格塞斯谈欧盟派遣飞机以帮助解放霍尔木兹海峡：记者：“是否有任何欧洲国家提出协助封锁海峡并参与护航？”皮特：“我知道有很多讨论，你看到了，我会称之为一场愚蠢的会议。上周在欧洲，他们聚在一起谈论谈论可能在事情结束后最终做点什么。这些还不是严肃的努力。我们会欢迎这样做。”@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Hezbollah Member of Parliament Mohammed Raad: Any supposed truce that grants the occupying enemy in Lebanon a special exception to fire or carry out any field action in confrontation zones and within Lebanese territory, whether it's to fortify a position, plant a mine, carry out an assassination, blow up a house or facility, or bulldoze land, is not a truce at all. Rather, it's a cunning deception and a way to fool others, which involves covering up Israeli aggression and turning a blind eye to the enemy's continued violations and breaches. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党议员穆罕默德·拉德：任何所谓的停火协议，如果给予黎巴嫩境内的占领敌军在对抗区和黎巴嫩领土内开火或采取任何实地行动的特殊豁免权，无论是为了加固阵地、埋设地雷、实施暗杀、炸毁房屋或设施，还是推平土地，这根本不是停火。相反，这是一种狡猾的欺骗和愚弄他人的方式，涉及掩盖以色列的侵略，并对敌人的持续违规和破坏视而不见。@wfwitness

text: Hegseth: Laying more mines is a violation of the ceasefire.
text_zh: 赫格塞斯：埋设更多地雷是违反停火协议的行为。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. Joint Chiefs of Staff Dan Cain on the U.S. operation to seize the Tuska: "Not surprisingly, the vessel then reported issues with their engine, went dead in the water, and began to comply with US directions and orders. At 4PM Eastern Standard Time…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth on Hormuz traffic: "So transit is occurring much more limited than anybody would like to see and with more risk than people would like to see, but that's because Iran is doing irresponsible things with small fastboats, crafts, like I said, with weapons on them. These are commercial ships. In some cases, cruise ships. Cruise ships that came through, being threatened by these." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国参谋长联席会议丹·凯恩谈美国扣押Tuska号的行动：‘不出所料，该船随后报告发动机出现问题，在水中失去动力，并开始遵守美国的指示和命令。东部标准时间下午4点……’” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国国防部长皮特·赫格塞斯谈霍尔木兹海峡交通：“所以交通的发生比任何人希望看到的都要有限得多，而且风险也比人们希望看到的要大，但这是因为伊朗用小型快艇、像我说的带有武器的船只在做不负责任的事情。这些是商船。在某些情况下，是游轮。经过这里的游轮正受到这些威胁。”@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. Joint Chiefs of Staff Dan Cain on the U.S. operation to seize the Tuska: "U.S. sailors warned the crew of the Tuska to abandon the engine And at approximately 9AM eastern time, the destroyer disabled the Tuska's engine by firing nine inert rounds…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. Joint Chiefs of Staff Dan Cain on the U.S. operation to seize the Tuska: "Not surprisingly, the vessel then reported issues with their engine, went dead in the water, and began to comply with US directions and orders. At 4PM Eastern Standard Time, CENTCOM ordered United States marines to seize the ship. Via helicopters, US marines maneuvered quickly to the disabled ship." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国参谋长联席会议丹·凯恩谈美国扣押Tuska号的行动：‘美国水手警告Tuska号船员放弃发动机，大约在东部时间上午9点，驱逐舰通过发射九枚惰性弹药使Tuska号的发动机瘫痪……’” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国参谋长联席会议丹·凯恩谈美国扣押Tuska号的行动：“不出所料，该船随后报告发动机出现问题，在水中失去动力，并开始遵守美国的指示和命令。东部标准时间下午4点，中央司令部命令美国海军陆战队扣押该船。通过直升机，美国海军陆战队迅速机动至瘫痪的船只上。”@wfwitness

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Drone alert sirens are active in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区无人机警报响起。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. Joint Chiefs of Staff Dan Cain on the U.S. operation to seize the Tuska: "The vessel and her crew continued to ignore warnings. And after exhausting all other measures, CENTCOM authorized disabling fire against the Tuska." @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. Joint Chiefs of Staff Dan Cain on the U.S. operation to seize the Tuska: "U.S. sailors warned the crew of the Tuska to abandon the engine And at approximately 9AM eastern time, the destroyer disabled the Tuska's engine by firing nine inert rounds from the destroyer's mark forty five five inch guns precisely in the engine room and engine space onboard the Tuska." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国参谋长联席会议丹·凯恩谈美国扣押Tuska号的行动：‘该船及其船员继续无视警告。在耗尽所有其他措施后，中央司令部授权对Tuska号进行瘫痪射击。’@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国参谋长联席会议丹·凯恩谈美国扣押Tuska号的行动：“美国水手警告Tuska号船员放弃发动机，大约在东部时间上午9点，驱逐舰通过向Tuska号的机舱和发动机空间精确发射九枚来自驱逐舰Mark 45五英寸舰炮的惰性弹药，使Tuska号的发动机瘫痪。”@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 U.S. Joint Chiefs of Staff Dan Cain on the U.S. operation to seize the Tuska: "Over a six hour period, the vessel and her crew repeatedly ignored US warnings. And then the US Navy destroyer executed a series of preplanned, carefully calibrated escalation…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. Joint Chiefs of Staff Dan Cain on the U.S. operation to seize the Tuska: "The vessel and her crew continued to ignore warnings. And after exhausting all other measures, CENTCOM authorized disabling fire against the Tuska." @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷 美国参谋长联席会议丹·凯恩谈美国扣押Tuska号的行动：‘在六小时的时间里，该船及其船员多次无视美国的警告。然后美国海军驱逐舰执行了一系列预先计划好的、经过仔细校准的升级……’” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国参谋长联席会议丹·凯恩谈美国扣押Tuska号的行动：“该船及其船员继续无视警告。在耗尽所有其他措施后，中央司令部授权对Tuska号进行瘫痪射击。”@wfwitness

text: Hegseth: Europe and Asia have benefited from our protection for decades. America and the free world need capable and loyal allies. Time for freeriding is over.
text_zh: 赫格塞斯：几十年来，欧洲和亚洲一直受益于我们的保护。美国和自由世界需要有能力且忠诚的盟友。搭便车的时代结束了。
